supplyPartnerId or inventory_id or suppl.description: ID of the supply partner you created in the Gamoshi dashboard. This parameter can be either a string or integer for Prebid.js, however integer is preferred

rtbEndpoint.description: If you have a whitelabel account on Gamoshi, specify it here.

bidfloor.description: Minimum acceptable bid price. Must be a positive number.

instl.description: Interstitial flag (1 for interstitial, 0 for non-interstitial).

rendererUrl.description: Custom renderer URL for outstream video.

video.description: Object containing video targeting parameters. See [Video Object](#video-object) for details.
